title: Rabbit Villagers Addon
description: Re-textures/renames vanilla Emerald items into Root Gems. Also re-textures the Totem of Undying to be Fox themed.
body:
Renames and re-textures all vanilla Villager and Pillager related items to fit with [CanineGray's Rabbit Villagers pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rabbit-villagers). While it isn't required to use that pack this addon will certainly make less sense without it.

![Showing a villager trade window with all retextures in view. The Root Gems are carrot shaped gems and the Totem of Undying is a fox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a99ad30fff775611669961e082166dc7b8a479.png)

Should be compatible with many more versions than 1.20.1.
